title: Technoblade
description: This Mod Adds Technoblade to The Game... May He Live Forever.
body:
In sorrow sight of Technoblade passing away i have made this mod which lets you spawn him in as a mob a keep him in your memory forever.

 

Fabric Versions Require Fabric api!

 

Discord: https://discord.gg/fgvJSHXs2b
